mapper.select:
SELECT ir.id, ir.medicine_id, m.medicine_code, m.medicine_name, ir.batch_no, ir.change_type, ir.change_quantity, ir.before_quantity, ir.after_quantity, ir.source_type, ir.source_id, ir.operator_id, u.real_name AS operator_name, ir.remark, ir.created_at FROM inventory_record ir INNER JOIN medicine m ON ir.medicine_id = m.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ir.operator_id = u.id
AND ( m.medicine_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.medicine_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ir.batch_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND ir.source_type = #{sourceType}
ORDER BY ir.created_at DESC, ir.id DESC
